title: Coerce String to Number
cap_description: Parse a string value as a number
documentation:
## Purpose

Parses a text string as a floating-point number. Use this when a string-producing cap outputs a numeric value as text and a downstream cap requires a numeric type.

## Inputs

A textable string representing a number (media type `media:textable`).

## Outputs

The parsed floating-point number.

## Notes

- Fails hard if the string is not a valid numeric value.
- For integers specifically, use [Coerce String to Integer](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in=media:textable;op=coerce;out="media:integer;numeric;textable").
- For the reverse, use [Coerce Number to String](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:numeric;textable";op=coerce;out=media:textable).
